class.name: CassieBeautifierParams
class.brief_description: Threshold bundle for the CASSIE beautifier pipeline.
class.description: Defaults match the Unity CASSIEParameters constants. Tune [member bezier_fitting_error] and [member rdp_error] to control fit smoothness, and [member mu_fidelity] / [member proximity_threshold] to tune how aggressively constraints overrule fidelity in the solver outer loop.
